questions.question: Why do you want to work at Apple?
questions.answer: Discuss Apple's innovation, focus on user experience, premium products, and engineering excellence.

questions.question: Tell me about a product or feature you designed or improved.
questions.answer: Explain the problem, your solution, implementation, and impact using the STAR method.

questions.question: How do you ensure a great user experience in your projects?
questions.answer: Discuss usability, testing, user feedback, and continuous improvements.

questions.question: Describe the most challenging technical problem you've solved.
questions.answer: Explain the challenge, your analysis, implementation, and measurable outcome.

questions.question: How do you maintain high quality in your work?
questions.answer: Mention testing, code reviews, documentation, and attention to detail.

questions.question: Tell me about a successful collaboration with a team.
questions.answer: Describe your role, communication, and the final result.

questions.question: How do you stay updated with new technologies?
questions.answer: Mention official documentation, WWDC sessions, courses, blogs, and hands-on projects.

questions.question: Describe a time when project requirements changed unexpectedly.
questions.answer: Explain how you adapted, reprioritized tasks, and delivered successfully.

questions.question: Tell me about a time you took initiative without being asked.
questions.answer: Describe how your initiative improved the project or team.

questions.question: Why should Apple hire you?
questions.answer: Highlight your technical expertise, creativity, attention to detail, and passion for building high-quality products.
